name: moosedev
description: Hover dossiers, knowledge diagnostics, code lenses, and proposal code actions from the MOOSEDev project knowledge graph.

moosedev.serverPath.description: Path to the moosedev binary. Empty resolves `moosedev` from PATH.

moosedev.diagnostics.constraints.description: Information-level diagnostics on entities with attached constraints/contracts.

moosedev.diagnostics.staleRationale.description: Hint-level diagnostics when linked rationale predates the file's last commit.

moosedev.codeLens.description: Knowledge badges above declarations (role/criticality, record counts, why-coverage hotspots).

moosedev.nudge.description: Once-per-session notice when proposals await ratification in the workbench inbox.

moosedev.trace.server.description: Trace LSP traffic between VS Code and the MOOSEDev daemon.
